import csv
import io
import json
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse

app = FastAPI()


def _generate_csv():
    yield "id,name,value\n"
    for i in range(100000):
        yield f"{i},item_{i},{i * 10.5}\n"


@app.get("/export/csv")
async def export_csv():
    return StreamingResponse(_generate_csv(), media_type="text/csv")


def _generate_json():
    yield "["
    for i in range(50000):
        if i > 0:
            yield ","
        yield json.dumps({"id": i, "name": f"record_{i}", "value": i * 3.14})
    yield "]"


@app.get("/export/json")
async def export_json():
    return StreamingResponse(_generate_json(), media_type="application/json")


def _generate_report():
    output = io.StringIO()
    writer = csv.writer(output)
    for i in range(200000):
        writer.writerow([i, f"data_{i}", i * 2.7])
        if i % 1000 == 0:
            yield output.getvalue()
            output.seek(0)
            output.truncate()
    remaining = output.getvalue()
    if remaining:
        yield remaining


@app.get("/download/report")
async def download_report():
    return StreamingResponse(_generate_report(), media_type="text/csv")
